endpoints.name: GET /providers/Microsoft.ManagedNetwork/operations
endpoints.description: Lists all of the available MNC operations.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.ManagedNetwork/managedNetworks
endpoints.description: The ListBySubscription  ManagedNetwork operation retrieves all the Managed Network Resources in the current subscription in a paginated format.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.ManagedNetwork/managedNetworks
endpoints.description: The ListByResourceGroup ManagedNetwork operation retrieves all the Managed Network resources in a resource group in a paginated format.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.ManagedNetwork/managedNetworks/{managedNetworkName}
endpoints.description: The Get ManagedNetworks operation gets a Managed Network Resource, specified by the resource group and Managed Network name
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{MANAGEDNETWORKNAME}} with a real managednetworkname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: PUT /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.ManagedNetwork/managedNetworks/{managedNetworkName}
endpoints.description: The Put ManagedNetworks operation creates/updates a Managed Network Resource, specified by resource group and Managed Network name
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{MANAGEDNETWORKNAME}} with a real managednetworkname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: DELETE /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.ManagedNetwork/managedNetworks/{managedNetworkName}
endpoints.description: The Delete ManagedNetworks operation deletes a Managed Network Resource, specified by the  resource group and Managed Network name
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{MANAGEDNETWORKNAME}} with a real managednetworkname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: PATCH /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.ManagedNetwork/managedNetworks/{managedNetworkName}
endpoints.description: Updates the specified Managed Network resource tags.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{MANAGEDNETWORKNAME}} with a real managednetworkname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.ManagedNetwork/managedNetworks/{managedNetworkName}/managedNetworkGroups
endpoints.description: The ListByManagedNetwork ManagedNetworkGroup operation retrieves all the Managed Network Groups in a specified Managed Networks in a paginated format.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{MANAGEDNETWORKNAME}} with a real managednetworkname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.ManagedNetwork/managedNetworks/{managedNetworkName}/managedNetworkGroups/{managedNetworkGroupName}
endpoints.description: The Get ManagedNetworkGroups operation gets a Managed Network Group specified by the resource group, Managed Network name, and group name
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{MANAGEDNETWORKNAME}} with a real managednetworkname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{MANAGEDNETWORKGROUPNAME}} with a real managednetworkgroupname.

endpoints.name: PUT /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.ManagedNetwork/managedNetworks/{managedNetworkName}/managedNetworkGroups/{managedNetworkGroupName}
endpoints.description: The Put ManagedNetworkGroups operation creates or updates a Managed Network Group resource
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{MANAGEDNETWORKNAME}} with a real managednetworkname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{MANAGEDNETWORKGROUPNAME}} with a real managednetworkgroupname.

endpoints.name: DELETE /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.ManagedNetwork/managedNetworks/{managedNetworkName}/managedNetworkGroups/{managedNetworkGroupName}
endpoints.description: The Delete ManagedNetworkGroups operation deletes a Managed Network Group specified by the resource group, Managed Network name, and group name
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{MANAGEDNETWORKNAME}} with a real managednetworkname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{MANAGEDNETWORKGROUPNAME}} with a real managednetworkgroupname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.ManagedNetwork/managedNetworks/{managedNetworkName}/managedNetworkPeeringPolicies
endpoints.description: The ListByManagedNetwork PeeringPolicies operation retrieves all the Managed Network Peering Policies in a specified Managed Network, in a paginated format.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{MANAGEDNETWORKNAME}} with a real managednetworkname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.ManagedNetwork/managedNetworks/{managedNetworkName}/managedNetworkPeeringPolicies/{managedNetworkPeeringPolicyName}
endpoints.description: The Get ManagedNetworkPeeringPolicies operation gets a Managed Network Peering Policy resource, specified by the  resource group, Managed Network name, and peering policy name
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{MANAGEDNETWORKNAME}} with a real managednetworkname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{MANAGEDNETWORKPEERINGPOLICYNAME}} with a real managednetworkpeeringpolicyname.

endpoints.name: PUT /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.ManagedNetwork/managedNetworks/{managedNetworkName}/managedNetworkPeeringPolicies/{managedNetworkPeeringPolicyName}
endpoints.description: The Put ManagedNetworkPeeringPolicies operation creates/updates a new Managed Network Peering Policy
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{MANAGEDNETWORKNAME}} with a real managednetworkname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{MANAGEDNETWORKPEERINGPOLICYNAME}} with a real managednetworkpeeringpolicyname.

endpoints.name: DELETE /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.ManagedNetwork/managedNetworks/{managedNetworkName}/managedNetworkPeeringPolicies/{managedNetworkPeeringPolicyName}
endpoints.description: The Delete ManagedNetworkPeeringPolicies operation deletes a Managed Network Peering Policy, specified by the  resource group, Managed Network name, and peering policy name
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{MANAGEDNETWORKNAME}} with a real managednetworkname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{MANAGEDNETWORKPEERINGPOLICYNAME}} with a real managednetworkpeeringpolicyname.

endpoints.name: GET /{scope}/providers/Microsoft.ManagedNetwork/scopeAssignments
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SCOPE}} with a real scope.

endpoints.name: GET /{scope}/providers/Microsoft.ManagedNetwork/scopeAssignments/{scopeAssignmentName}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SCOPE}} with a real scope. Replace {{SCOPEASSIGNMENTNAME}} with a real scopeassignmentname.

endpoints.name: PUT /{scope}/providers/Microsoft.ManagedNetwork/scopeAssignments/{scopeAssignmentName}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SCOPE}} with a real scope. Replace {{SCOPEASSIGNMENTNAME}} with a real scopeassignmentname.

endpoints.name: DELETE /{scope}/providers/Microsoft.ManagedNetwork/scopeAssignments/{scopeAssignmentName}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SCOPE}} with a real scope. Replace {{SCOPEASSIGNMENTNAME}} with a real scopeassignmentname.
